series_metadata.series_description: Privious record series 734-003 entitled "End of Year Report"will now be under the 744 series for the Division of Mineral Resources Management.Due to Legislation changes that combined the divisions. These reports contain the summary of previous years oil and gas drilling and production activity for each county that has oil and gas wells producing,as well as each well that is producing. This information is gathered and reported back to the industry as well as the general public.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent, reports are available on divisions website. www.dnr.state.oh.us
